riskFloorReasons: new capability: new exported class / subsystem added

causalAutopsy.notes: The 'avoid single accumulation points' efficiency value existed as design lore but was enforced by nothing — a latent Structure-beats-Willpower gap (the storage twin of the compute-mass gap Bounded Blast Radius named). It surfaced on 2026-06-21 when Echo's .instar/ reached a 256MB token-ledger + 91MB cartographer index + a dozen unbounded JSONLs, and whole-file synchronous reads of those snapshots were a direct cause of recurring event-loop stalls. This increment gives the value structural teeth.
